Container.Name: ScriptWatch-Agent
Container.Overview: ScriptWatch Agent — polls the central ScriptWatch API for pending jobs, executes scripts locally on this Unraid server, and reports results back. Sends a heartbeat every 30 seconds to keep the server green on the dashboard.

Config.Name: API URL
Config.Description: URL of the ScriptWatch central API

Config.Name: Server Name
Config.Description: Unique name for this server as it appears in the ScriptWatch dashboard

Config.Name: Agent Token
Config.Description: Secret token — must match AGENT_TOKEN in your ScriptWatch API .env file
